title: feat: integrate external library
body:
## Overview

Use the external crate once it's stable.

## Expected Behavior

maestro depends on external-org/external-repo#123.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Dep added to Cargo.toml
- [ ] Wire calls in session/manager.rs

## Files to Modify

- Cargo.toml
- src/session/manager.rs

## Test Hints

Mock the external crate's trait.

## Blocked By

- external-org/external-repo#123

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests pass
